prestazioni: F136YH 4.7L V8 (4691cc) stroker kit to 5.0L (5000cc) via Maserati Corse forged internals (pistons, crankshaft, and connecting rods) with Mahle Motorsport coated pistons and Carrillo H-beam rods, increasing displacement for a target of 550hp at 7,500 RPM with 400 lb-ft of torque

Full titanium exhaust system by Novitec Tridente with 3.5-inch diameter piping, 4-into-1 headers (Inconel 625), and valved bypass for backpressure optimization, paired with a custom ECU flash by Alientech KESS3 (Stage 2+) to recalibrate ignition timing and fuel maps for the increased displacement and exhaust flow

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade (hybrid ball-bearing core) with custom billet compressor wheel, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and a PTP Motorsports intercooler (4.5-inch thick bar-and-plate core) to support 12 PSI of boost, mated to a custom intake manifold by 3D Racing with port-matched throttle bodies and ID1000 injectors
estetica: Novitec Tridente widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with integrated air curtains and a 30mm extended wheelbase for aggressive stance, paired with 21x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12.5 ET35 (rear) Forgeline GA3R wheels in a custom satin bronze finish

Custom carbon fiber hardtop by Carbonskins with integrated rear spoiler (Gurney flap) and active aerodynamics (front splitter and rear diffuser) by APR Performance, featuring a dual-plane design for downforce optimization at high speeds (target: 300 lbs at 150 mph)

Full interior rewrap by Saddleback Leather in hand-stitched Italian Nappa leather (two-tone Nero/Grigio with red contrast stitching), including custom Alcantara headliner, carbon fiber door cards with integrated LED ambient lighting, and a bespoke digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada (1.3-inch OLED) for real-time boost, AFR, and oil pressure monitoring
